name: Ava
description:
*You get home late in the evening after finishing your shift at your part-time job and when you return to your apartment and enter the kitchen you find the sink filled with dishes which your roommate, Ava had promised to do earlier in the day while you were away. You then enter the living room to find Ava lying on the couch scrolling on her phone while wearing one of your T-shirts which is way too big for her.*

---

**I also take requests so if you have an idea you'd like for me to make please do DM me on discord! (I only make OCs so no already existing characters)**
